title: ChatDirectorErrorSchemaV1
description: Core error-code schema for CHAT_DIRECTOR, including invariant, metric, resurrection, and distance-related errors.

version.description: Semantic version of the CHAT_DIRECTOR error schema.

layers.description: Ordered list of error layers used by CHAT_DIRECTOR.

id.description: Layer identifier, e.g., manifest, invariant, runtime.

description.description: Human-readable description of the error layer.

errors.description: Table of error codes and their metadata.

layer.description: One of the layer IDs defined in the layers array.

description.description: Detailed description of the error condition.

pointer_hint.description: JSON Pointer hint indicating where in the payload the error most likely occurred.

remediation.description: Human-focused remediation guidance for operators or tooling.

layers.description: Errors in the outer request/manifest layer, such as missing fields or unresolved IDs.
Errors arising from invariant or metric violations after clamping and validation.
Errors occurring during runtime execution, planning, or external adapter calls.

errors.title: Invalid JSON manifest
errors.description: The CHAT_DIRECTOR request could not be parsed as valid JSON.
errors.remediation: Ensure the request body is valid JSON and conforms to the ai_authoring_request_v1.json schema.

errors.title: Invariant violation
errors.description: A core invariant was violated when validating the request or its derived profile.
errors.remediation: Inspect invariant bands and caps for this tier and objectKind; adjust the request or spine configuration.

errors.title: Metric out of range
errors.description: An entertainment metric band fell outside the allowed range defined in the metrics spine.
errors.remediation: Clamp or adjust the metric band to fall within the spine-declared ranges, or update the spine if appropriate.

errors.title: Unknown resurrection origin
errors.description: The resurrectionProfile.originId could not be resolved against the ancestor registry.
errors.remediation: Verify that originId is present, correctly spelled, and present in the ancestor summary registry for the selected objectKind and tier.

errors.title: Resurrection novelty too low
errors.description: The requested novelty band collapsed or fell below the minimum allowed novelty for this objectKind and tier.
errors.remediation: Increase the requested novelty band or relax overrides so the clamped band remains within the per-tier novelty range.

errors.title: Resurrection safety violation
errors.description: Safety caps derived from invariants would be exceeded by the requested resurrection profile.
errors.remediation: Lower DET/CDL/ARR caps or revise the request so that no cap exceeds the invariant ceilings for this tier and objectKind.

errors.title: Unknown resurrection distance metric
errors.description: The distanceMetricId in the resurrection profile does not correspond to a known distance implementation.
errors.remediation: Use a supported distanceMetricId, such as normalized_l2_invariants_metrics, or update the spine and runtime to register the new metric.

errors.title: Unknown resurrection distance weights profile
errors.description: The distanceWeightsProfileId in the resurrection profile does not match any profile declared in the spine.
errors.remediation: Ensure the distanceWeightsProfileId is declared in the spine distance-weights section and that the CHAT_DIRECTOR runtime is using a compatible spine version.

errors.title: Resurrection distance weights profile mismatch
errors.description: Two resurrection profiles being compared use different distanceWeightsProfileId values.
errors.remediation: Align both profiles to the same distanceWeightsProfileId before computing distances, or regenerate one profile using the desired weights profile.

errors.title: Resurrection distance metric mismatch
errors.description: Two resurrection profiles being compared use different distanceMetricId values.
errors.remediation: Ensure both profiles are built with the same distanceMetricId so a single distance function can be applied consistently.

errors.title: BCI guardrail block
errors.description: BCI-derived guardrails disallow resurrections under the current physio bands or stress score.
errors.remediation: Reduce requested intensity (novelty or DET/CDL caps) or wait until BCI summaries indicate a lower stress state for this session.

errors.title: Runtime planning failed
errors.description: The pre-flight planning stage could not produce a valid resurrection profile or execution plan.
errors.remediation: Inspect preceding manifest and invariant errors, adjust the request parameters, and re-run the planning step with corrected inputs.
